scripts.test: echo "Error: This is a monorepo. Do not run 'bun test' or 'npm test' from the root." && echo "" && echo "For daemon tests: ./scripts/test-daemon.sh" && echo "For web tests: cd packages/web && bunx vitest run" && echo "For e2e tests: make run-e2e TEST=tests/features/foo.e2e.ts" && echo "See CLAUDE.md for more details." && exit 1
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run knip && bun run check:session-guards
